items.title: UBER Soars 55% YTD: How Should Investors Play the Stock Now?
items.description: Uber's 55% YTD surge is fueled by strong bookings, drone delivery moves and a $20B buyback plan, but valuation concerns linger.

items.title: Beyond Meat Plummets After Debt Swap Massively Dilutes Shareholders
items.description: Beyond Meat exploded after its public debut six years ago, with the company once valued at over $14 billion.  Beyond Meat now has a market cap of about $80 million.  Beyond Meat has no buy ratings, five holds and six sells, according to data compiled by Bloomberg.

items.title: 2 Dow Jones Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Question
items.description: The Dow Jones (^DJI) is made up of 30 of the most established and influential companies in the market. But even blue-chip stocks can struggle - some are dealing with slowing growth, outdated business models, or increasing competition.

items.title: How to get a free coffee every day of the week
items.description: The humble takeaway coffee gets a bad reputation – along with avocados, it’s been vilified as the reason millennials struggle to buy their first home and why Generation X can’t pay more into their pensions.
